data.content:
Implemented a launcher URL fix for 0.0.0.0 binds. The generated launcher now keeps the advertised URL truthful for status/start output while using a separate local control URL for health checks, doctor calls, and browser-open behavior.

Branch: worktree-foolery-a9c0-launcher-url-log
Commit: 95e7fb5be857bca1576182d6795bd75a2e149fd4

Verification:
- bun test src/lib/__tests__/install-launcher-path.test.ts
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run build
